options.name: Mounting Fury
options.effect: +20% damage right after an enemy strikes you — the reactive bruiser answers every blow.

options.name: Bristling Bulwark
options.effect: +22% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — turn a packed pull into a grinder.

options.name: Tempered Edge
options.effect: +16% damage while 2 or fewer enemies remain — a reliable single-target floor.

options.name: Iron Tether
options.effect: Your Shield Bash brands the target with a Tether (Mark) — the whole party hits it +15% harder.

options.name: Twin-Chain Haul
options.effect: Revenge now strikes an extra adjacent enemy — collapse two foes at once.

options.name: Brand the Caught
options.effect: Shield Bash hits 40% harder against targets below 30% HP — punish what you've caught.

options.name: Banner of Valor
options.effect: Bulwark Banner's cooldown drops to 48s — raise the party's guard far more often.

options.name: Unbreaking Glare
options.effect: Challenge's cooldown drops to 6s — snap a loose threat back onto you twice as fast.

options.name: Daunting Roar
options.effect: −10% damage taken while 3 or more enemies are up — weather a packed pull.

options.name: Riposting Aegis
options.effect: +16% damage right after you are struck — the more they beat the wall, the more it answers.

options.name: Sheltering Ward
options.effect: +12% max HP — a deeper buffer for the predicted spike.

options.name: Resolute Footing
options.effect: −22% damage taken while below 50% HP — smooth every spike once the fight is rolling.

options.name: Sentinel's Burden
options.effect: −18% damage taken while you hold hard threat — the immovable anchor the pull breaks on.

options.name: Valor Repaid
options.effect: Your strikes heal the lowest-HP ally for 30% of the damage dealt — soak it, give it back.

options.name: The Line Breaks
options.effect: +24% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — a pack-shredding chain-collapse finisher.

options.name: Edge of Ruin
options.effect: +18% damage while below 40% HP — ride the edge for the snowball.

options.name: Lifeblood Renewal
options.effect: +12% max HP and your crits heal you for 6% max HP (up from 3%) — a self-topping body.

options.name: Warbound Cadence
options.effect: +12% damage while at 3 or more Rampage — a steady payoff that never stalls.

options.name: Reaving Sweep
options.effect: +24% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — multiply Steel Cyclone into packs.

options.name: Throat-Finder
options.effect: +22% damage while 2 or fewer enemies remain — fatten every blow in a duel.

options.name: Even Temper
options.effect: +11% damage, always — the safe generalist that never whiffs.

name: The Wound That Will Not Close

options.name: Riving Wound
options.effect: Your Cleaving Strike brands the target with Riven Wound: −50% incoming healing — the only true anti-heal.

options.name: Rending Frenzy
options.effect: Steel Cyclone (Bladestorm) hits far harder (scale 1.35 → 1.6) — your premier sustained AoE nuke.

options.name: Hungering Onslaught
options.effect: +20% damage to targets below 30% HP, and a Reaping Blow kill refunds 2 Rampage.

options.name: Battle Resolve
options.effect: −20% damage taken while below 35% HP — a net for the edge-walker.

options.name: Crimson Tithe
options.effect: +12% max HP and −6% damage taken — the undying-bruiser body that needs no babysitting.

options.name: Reckless Disregard
options.effect: Reckless Frenzy lasts +9s longer — a deadlier all-in offensive window.

options.name: Rampant Slaughter
options.effect: A Reaping Blow kill resets its own cooldown — chain executes across a dying pack.

options.name: Crimson Crescendo
options.effect: Each Rampage stack now grants +6% damage (up from 4%) — the highest steady ceiling.

options.name: Headsman's Certainty
options.effect: Reaping Blow strikes 50% harder against targets below 35% HP — delete bosses in the kill window.

options.name: Light of the Sworn
options.effect: Guardian's Oath reduces the redirected damage you take by 35% (up from 20%) — the predictive peeler.

options.name: Goldwrought Vigil
options.effect: Holy Strike's ally guard is +10% armour for 6s (up from +5%/3s) — a rolling shield on whoever takes the heat.

options.name: The Bulwark Holds
options.effect: −10% damage taken while you hold hard threat — the selfish anchor wall.

options.name: Bulwark Litany
options.effect: Rally Cry's cooldown drops to 12s — press the party window before every heavy stretch.

options.name: Stillvalor Aegis
options.effect: Sacred Bastion's cooldown drops to 48s — two surgical peels for a two-spike fight.

options.name: Daybreak Cadence
options.effect: Rally Cry's party power buff rises to +20% (from +15%) — lean into the timer race.

options.name: Dawnforged Bulwark
options.effect: Radiant Aegis's absorb is +50% larger — the surest pre-block for a known big hit.

options.name: Spreading Benediction
options.effect: Radiant Aegis's cooldown drops to 18s — keep a shield rolling across a bleeding line.

options.name: Radiant Reprisal
options.effect: +12% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — a damage-tank that swings the kill clock.

options.name: Steadfast Forbearance
options.effect: −25% damage taken while below 50% HP — eat a lethal hit for an ally and live.

options.name: Oathbound Reprisal
options.effect: +24% damage while you hold hard threat — convert the peel into a personal burst window.

options.name: Reckoning of the Warden
options.effect: Guardian's Oath's cooldown drops to 9s — peel a chained spike beat after beat.

options.name: Aegis of the Dawnsworn
options.effect: Sacred Bastion becomes a 70%-max-HP peel on a 42s cooldown — the definitive single-event refusal.

options.name: Vault of the Dawn
options.effect: Sacred Bastion becomes a 90%-max-HP disaster dome — read the heavy window and press it.

options.name: Reliquary of Radiance
options.effect: +16% damage while you hold hard threat, plus a sturdy Sacred Bastion — one cooldown that peels and swings.

options.name: Choir of Dawn
options.effect: Smite's Atonement heals for 70% of damage dealt (up from 50%) — the off-school throughput floor.

options.name: Kindled Offering
options.effect: Holy Fire's cooldown drops to 9s and Smite no longer Atones — commit to the burning DoT.

options.name: Piercing Ray
options.effect: +15% damage — weaponise your filler into bigger smites and bigger Atonement.

options.name: Sanctuary Bloom
options.effect: Mending Light heals 25% harder — a bigger reactive top for the spike.

options.name: Steadfast Grace
options.effect: Mending Light's cooldown drops to 3s — a near-spammable instant top to pre-empt the spike.

options.name: Greater Mending
options.effect: Dawnward heals far harder (scale 1.8 → 2.2) — your hardest non-major top.

options.name: Radiant Absolution
options.effect: Cleansing Light's cooldown drops to 12s — keep the Magic/Curse wave off the party.

options.name: Sanctified Fervor
options.effect: +14% damage — steadier off-school throughput that always pays.

options.name: Solar Verdict
options.effect: +18% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — lean into AoE radiant damage that feeds Atonement.

options.name: Crowned in Light
options.effect: While any ally is below 30% HP, your Atonement spreads to the whole party — off-school crisis healing.

options.name: Zealous Devotion
options.effect: +18% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — radiant spam clears trash and trickle-heals.

options.name: Final Light
options.effect: +20% damage to targets below 30% HP — the kill window's biggest Atonement heals.

options.name: Light's Salvation
options.effect: Light's Salvation heals far harder (scale 1.6 → 2.0) — the single biggest instant save in the game.

options.name: Solar Reckoning
options.effect: Light's Salvation's cooldown drops to 48s, +12% damage on packs — the AoE damage-as-healing burst.

options.name: Dawnpeal
options.effect: Light's Salvation comes up in 42s and Cleansing Light in 12s — the dispel build's hard-reset.

options.name: Opening Cut
options.effect: +25% damage to targets above 80% HP — front-load the alpha strike on a fresh add.

options.name: Shadowleap
options.effect: Ambush hits the back band 30% harder — fold the dive into your stealth opener.

options.name: Throatcut
options.effect: Ambush hits targets below 35% HP 30% harder — a second finisher for the kill race.

options.name: Singular Malice
options.effect: +22% damage while 2 or fewer enemies remain — single-target erase for bosses and adds.

options.name: Whispering Edge
options.effect: Poisoned Blade also strikes an adjacent enemy — the tree's only AoE answer.

options.name: Twin Daggers
options.effect: +9% damage and +5% crit, always — reliable uptime with no condition to read.

options.name: Weeping Venom
options.effect: +12% damage to targets below 50% HP — a ramp that pays across a long fight.

options.name: Venom Glut
options.effect: +16% damage to targets below 30% HP — turn the poison ramp into one explosive spend.

options.name: Silent Patience
options.effect: +6% damage and +5% crit, always — steady value that ignores the stack economy.

options.name: Bladed Cascade
options.effect: +12% crit while your focus target is below 50% HP — keep the kill-window chain alive.

options.name: Lethal Precision
options.effect: +8% crit and +4% damage, always — reliable throughput without a chain to hold.

options.name: Predator's Vigor
options.effect: Your crits heal you for 4% max HP — enough lifesteal to dive without a babysitter.

options.name: Endless Slaughter
options.effect: A kill resets Eviscerate's cooldown — a wave-erasing soft-enrage executioner.

options.name: Sever the Thread
options.effect: Ambush and Poisoned Blade hit the back band 40% harder — erase the sheltered caster.

options.name: Fade to Black
options.effect: After a kill you re-enter Stealth — a free empowered opener as you chain through the pull.

options.name: Killing Mark
options.effect: +14% damage to targets below 50% HP — the Mark becomes a personal kill stamp.

options.name: Hunting Marks
options.effect: +16% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — spray Marks across the pack.

options.name: Steady Mark
options.effect: +8% damage, always — a level draw that never goes dark.

options.name: Hawkeye's Volley
options.effect: Hawkeye's Reach picks off two back-band targets and hits there 30% harder — the back-line assassin.

options.name: Heavy Draw
options.effect: Hawkeye's Reach hits targets below 35% HP 50% harder — a second execute hammer.

options.name: Patient Line
options.effect: +12% damage while 2 or fewer enemies remain — favour the patient line over the crowd.

options.name: Serrated Shot
options.effect: Your Mark also barbs the target: Serrated Wound, −40% incoming healing — the ranged anti-heal.

options.name: Falling Aim
options.effect: +18% damage to targets below 30% HP — save your steadiest shots for the kill.

options.name: Steady Sight
options.effect: +6% crit, always — passive precision that always contributes.

options.name: Hawkstride
options.effect: −14% damage taken while 3 or more enemies are up — read the pull and stay out of the hail.

options.name: Set Feet
options.effect: −12% damage taken while below 35% HP — plant your feet for the kill without dying.

options.name: Roll Aside
options.effect: −8% damage taken, always — a standing cushion against back-line spillover.

options.name: The Last Shot
options.effect: +28% damage to targets below 35% HP — every shot becomes a finisher in the kill window.

options.name: Culling Storm
options.effect: +24% damage on packs and a far heavier Arrow Storm — the pack-clearing crescendo.

options.name: Hunter's Largesse
options.effect: +12% damage to any Marked target — focus everything onto the Mark.

options.name: Creeping Embers
options.effect: +16% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — blanket the pack so every detonation hits everyone.

options.name: Smothering Ash
options.effect: Your Burn ticks 35% harder (up from +20%) — fewer targets, a far hotter bar.

options.name: Kindled Patience
options.effect: +10% damage, always — a faster ramp with no commitment to spread or tall ticks.

options.name: Pyre-Vents
options.effect: Detonating 4+ Burn grants +35% power for 9s (up from +25%/6s) — the inferno payoff.

options.name: Cinderburst
options.effect: Ignite splashes to +1 more target at 70% — the widest explosion across a stacked pack.

options.name: Stoked Furnace
options.effect: Ignite's cooldown drops to 12s — detonate far more often for steady throughput.

options.name: Far-Cast Ember
options.effect: +18% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — answer the wall and the back caster at once.

options.name: Focused Pyre
options.effect: +20% damage while 2 or fewer enemies remain — pure ceiling on the kill target.

options.name: Banked Heat
options.effect: +10% damage, always — a modest tempo reward for parking on one target.

options.name: Ashen Veil
options.effect: −12% damage taken while 3 or more enemies are up — survival earned by playing the pack.

options.name: Searing Resolve
options.effect: +14% damage to targets below 30% HP — pure offense for the soft-enrage race.

options.name: Emberglass
options.effect: −8% damage taken and +4% damage — a thin always-on cushion plus a little output.

options.name: Conflagrant Bloom
options.effect: +16% damage on packs and Emberstorm splashes wider — the definitive trash-melter.

options.name: Crown of Cinders
options.effect: +18% damage to targets below 35% HP — a chain-detonation kill engine on the boss.

options.name: Warden of Embers
options.effect: +20% damage to stunned targets — fuse the detonation lock into a throughput spike.

options.name: Silence the Spire
options.effect: +14% damage to silenced targets — pays off when a dangerous caster must die first.

options.name: Glaciate
options.effect: Arcane Bolt hits Chilled targets 30% harder — every bolt into your own slow snowballs.

options.name: Glittering Frost
options.effect: +14% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — unconditional-feeling cleave for add packs.

options.name: Hushing Frost
options.effect: Glacial Burst also Silences everything it hits — a true mass shut-up for an add wave.

options.name: Deepening Cold
options.effect: Glacial Burst hits harder (scale 0.6 → 0.8) — a heavier freeze-setup nuke.

options.name: Rimebrand
options.effect: +12% damage to Chilled targets — convert your spammy slow into raw pack damage.

options.name: Warded Mind
options.effect: Rune Barrier's cooldown drops to 12s — the lockdown caster who can't be locked down.

options.name: Shattering Aegis
options.effect: +14% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — fold your defensive into a pack-clearing bomb.

options.name: Frostward Veil
options.effect: −10% damage taken, always — a small personal buffer for the back line under a soft-enrage.

options.name: Cold Focus
options.effect: +10% crit against Chilled targets — reward bolting into your own CC.

options.name: Resonant Cadence
options.effect: +8% damage, always — the reliable tempo floor that works on any target.

options.name: Winter's Hunger
options.effect: +20% damage to targets below 35% HP — close kills fast in the soft-enrage race.

options.name: Winterwarden
options.effect: +22% damage to Chilled targets — convert every lock into a damage window.

options.name: The Long Winter
options.effect: Spellbreak's cooldown drops to 6s and adds +9s to the target's next cast — the interrupt tyrant.

options.name: Glacial Cataclysm
options.effect: Glacial Burst comes up in 9s and hits harder — chain Bursts across back-to-back packs.

options.name: Verdant Spread
options.effect: Grove's Embrace comes up in 12s — maximum rolling-HoT coverage when the room is full.

options.name: Sunwarden's Vigor
options.effect: −8% damage taken, always — steel the grove-keeper so a thin healer survives the long pull.

options.name: Quick Bloom
options.effect: Blossom Ward comes up in 6s — re-blanket a fresh layer the moment the floor opens.

options.name: Cleansing Litany
options.effect: Unbinding Word comes up in 6s — the plague never escalates past you (the Mire answer).

options.name: Thornward Vigor
options.effect: +14% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — contribute to the trash race while you heal.

options.name: Grounded Roots
options.effect: +12% max HP — a deeper grave to draw from on a clean week with nothing to dispel.

options.name: Sudden Bloom
options.effect: Flourish comes up in 6s — short, intense blooms for the kill window.

options.name: Evergreen Renewal
options.effect: −10% damage taken while 3 or more enemies are up — the green that outlasts a long grind.

options.name: Even Tending
options.effect: +12% max HP — a steady durability floor that asks nothing of your timing.

options.name: Verdant Reclamation
options.effect: Vital Surge comes up in 9s — fold emergency triage into a faster button.

options.name: Sheltering Bloom
options.effect: −8% damage taken, always — a thin standing cushion for the back line.

options.name: Gale Severance
options.effect: +12% damage to targets below 30% HP — lean into offensive draw in the kill window.

options.name: Endless Spring
options.effect: Blossoming Tide comes up in 48s — keep the party pre-blanketed against sustained pressure.

options.name: Verdant Reckoning
options.effect: +18% damage while 3 or more enemies are up — an off-school smite answer to the armour wall.

options.name: Grove Warden
options.effect: +12% max HP and −8% damage taken — the survival capstone for a healer-light comp.

options.name: Spirit Drinker
options.effect: Earthen Stance parries 60% of attacks (up from 40%) — more counters, more drink-back.

options.name: Flowing Calm
options.effect: Your strikes heal the lowest-HP ally for 15% of the damage dealt — a trickle of party sustain.

options.name: Stone Cadence
options.effect: Earthen Sweep comes up in 6s — near-permanent AoE-stun lockdown on a busy pack.

options.name: Iron Focus
options.effect: Zen Strike comes up in 12s — a clean kick off cooldown for the dangerous-cast boss.

options.name: Gathering Storm
options.effect: Earthen Sweep hits the whole front band and stuns it all — the add-wave answer.

options.name: Resonant Chime
options.effect: +12% damage to stunned targets — your lockdown becomes a kill window.

options.name: Rooted Stance
options.effect: −16% damage taken while below 60% HP — strong once the pressure is on, dead while topped.

options.name: Steadying Brew
options.effect: −8% damage taken, always — a small reliable cushion for an unsteady pilot.

options.name: Rising Breath
options.effect: −20% damage taken while below 35% HP — the comeback lever that saves the killing spike.

options.name: Shared Burden
options.effect: Spirit Tether redirects 50% of the ally's damage onto you (up from 30%) — the sustained-drain save.

options.name: Severing Tether
options.effect: Spirit Tether comes up in 9s — a frequent emergency spike-soak.

options.name: Twin Spirits
options.effect: Spirit Tether reduces the redirected damage by 30% (up from 20%) — a gentler, broader peel.

options.name: The Mountain Holds
options.effect: Living Mountain comes up in 48s and Earthen Stance parries 70% — the immovable control-tank.

options.name: Warden of Spirits
options.effect: −16% damage taken while you hold hard threat, but −10% of your own damage — the pure protector.

options.name: Hand of Stillwater
options.effect: +20% damage below 30% HP and Palm Strike hits 50% harder there — finish the pull by drinking it dry.
